MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-30-2009 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS HELD. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS THE CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/19/09 IS CONTINUED TO 3/8/2010 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT SETS FORTH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS IN THE EVENT THAT WHEN PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE HERE FOR TRIAL, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO FILE A MOTION FOR FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL NO LATER THAN 1/25/2010. IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION, DOCUMENTS SUPPORTING THE STATUS OF THE PLAINTIFF BEING INCARCERATED IN MEXICO WHICH WOULD INCLUDE THE CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS LIKE CASE NUMBER, CHARGES, JAIL STATUS AND ALSO IMMIGRATION STATUS IF HE WILL BE ABLE TO RETURN TO THE UNITED STATES. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR# 8620 (502)
